# Fiber Raman Suppression

Compact source map for agents and LLM tools.

## Start Here

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): mandatory operating rules.
- [README.md](README.md): project overview and first commands.
- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): human-facing doc map.
- [agent-docs/README.md](agent-docs/README.md): minimal agent context map.

## Supported Spine

- `src/fiberlab/`: notebook-facing FiberLab API for fiber optimization.
- `src/simulation/`, `src/gain_simulation/`, `src/mmf_cost.jl`: inherited
  physics backend.
- `configs/experiments/`: serialized experiments for reproducible runs.
- `lab_extensions/`: experimental controls and objectives.
- `scripts/canonical/`: maintained compatibility entry points.
- `scripts/lib/`: transitional Julia runner/orchestration internals.
- `./fiberlab`: Bash router to maintained Julia commands.
- `test/`: supported regression tests.

Python is not a supported API surface.
Ignored local folders such as `.venv/`, `.claude/`, `.burst-sync/`, and
`.pytest_cache/` are not source structure.

## Core Docs

- [Installation](docs/guides/installation.md)
- [FiberLab concepts](docs/concepts/fiberlab-model.md)

- [Repo navigation](docs/architecture/repo-navigation.md)
- [Output format](docs/architecture/output-format.md)
- [Cost convention](docs/notes/cost-convention.md)

## Current Status

- [Research verdicts](docs/research-verdicts.md)
- [Current agent context](agent-docs/current-agent-context/INDEX.md)

## Archive Boundary

Raw results, old notebooks, historical planning, bulky artifacts, and old agent
topic folders were moved out of the active repo on 2026-05-04:

```text
/Users/ignaciojlizama/RiveraLab/fiber-raman-results-vault/active-tree-archive-20260504/
```

Do not recursively inspect `results/` or archived material by default.
